title: lophatherum japonicum
intro: Lophatherum japonicum, also known as Japanese lophatherum or Japanese mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and aiding in digestion. Lophatherum japonicum is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
